description_long: This is a pair of pliers featuring two elongated, ergonomically curved handles with a black and blue rubberized coating for enhanced grip and comfort. The handles converge at a central circular pivot joint, allowing the jaws to open and close smoothly. The jaws are short, robust, and flat with a notched gripping surface, suitable for gripping, bending, or cutting wires and small objects. The metal jaws have a matte, slightly textured finish, while the handles are visually distinct with their dual-color scheme. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for both professional and household tasks. No visible branding or logos are present on the tool.
description: A pair of ergonomic pliers with black and blue rubberized handles and flat, notched metal jaws. The tool is sturdy, with a matte finish and a central pivot joint.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the pliers, highlighting the curved handles and the flat, notched jaws.
description_view_1: Angled view from the handle end, emphasizing the ergonomic curvature and the blue grip accents.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the other handle and the robust metal jaws.
description_view_3: Front view from the jaw end, clearly showing the notched gripping surfaces and the pivot mechanism.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, ergonomic handles with black and blue rubberized insulation for comfort and slip resistance.
attribute_jaw_design: Short, flat jaws with notched gripping surfaces, suitable for gripping and cutting; lacks needle-nose or diagonal features.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Fixed central pivot joint, allowing standard opening and closing motion without adjustable jaw width.
attribute_grip_pattern: Rubberized handles with a smooth exterior and subtle contouring for enhanced grip.
